title: In-Flight Promise Deduplication, Waiters, Abort Ownership, and Cleanup · Type Recall
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs in-flight promise deduplication, waiters, abort ownership, and cleanup from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for waiter-aware duplicate-suppressed async loader after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Use the canonical resource key to register exactly one controlled load separate from the completed-value cache.
Give the loader its own controller and define waiter registration, completion, publication, and final cleanup.
Allow a waiter to stop observing without necessarily aborting work required by others and cancel shared work only under policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
